batch_objective: Three previously-attempted-but-unfixed deferred features under full /dev-flow rigor (operator: 'not the first time we try to fix them' -> Phase 0 MUST investigate prior attempts via git history + current code before deriving). US-018 (#9): workspace view hex column must show 16 bytes + ASCII decode on a single line (currently wraps/truncates). US-019 (CRC honours selected width): write_crc_image (crc.py:790/879) must emit the operator-selected S19 record width (16/32), not the hardcoded default 32 -> thread a width selection through write_crc_image + the I5b confirm handler; builds on the fixed-32 lock-AT shipped PR #26. US-020 (#10): issues-report viewer -> right-side hex pane + report-addendum input (declared memory locations) + enhanced issues list.
branch: claude/batch-17 (cut fresh off origin/main 963142c per RC-1 base-currency gate; batches 14/15/16 + the #24/#25/#26 micro-PRs all merged)
